communication_quality.justification: The candidate provided no speech, resulting in a complete lack of communication. All metrics (vocabulary, filler words, clarity, pace) are therefore undefined and poor.

coherence.justification: Due to the absence of any speech, there is no coherence to evaluate. The response has no logical flow, topic, or structure.

sports_knowledge.justification: Without any speech from the candidate, it's impossible to assess their sports knowledge. There's no evidence of any understanding of rules, teams, players, stats, or trends.
